# MultiRoundTrip.RequiredClientCapabilityForInputRequest method

Returns the client-capability name an input-request *method* requires, or `null` for an unrecognized method (§11.2, R-11.2-j).

```csharp
public static string? RequiredClientCapabilityForInputRequest(string method)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| method | The input-request method name. |

## Return Value

The required capability name, or `null`.
